title: ivodea moheliensis
intro: Ivodea moheliensis, also known as the Moheli ivodea, is a plant species in the family Icacinaceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used in the Comoros Islands to treat various health conditions. The plant has been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. Ivodea moheliensis is used in herbal preparations such as infusions and decoctions to treat ailments such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, offering health benefits like immune system support and wound healing.
